title: Task
description: Engine -> device dispatch, published to neuraroute/task/<device_id>.

request_id.description: the parent request this task belongs to

payload.description: what run_model(op, payload) receives. Always {"inputs": {<upstream_local_id>: <that task's result>}}; the entry task (extract_text) additionally gets {"document": {"filename", "bytes", "pdf_b64"}} — the uploaded PDF base64-encoded.

depends_on.description: task_ids that must complete first (engine only dispatches when ready)
